body.title: CLOSED: Sprint Step 0 — capability-aware delegate prompt before claim
body.result: Added /sprint Step 1.5 + /sprint-batch per-ticket Step 0.5: capability check (mcp__* tools, datacenter_manifest) before claim, surface delegate option as one-liner when minion/device matches ticket tags or affected files. Match heuristics for Database/Cognition/Debug tags + wild_igor/igor/ work. Silent on no match. Synced to agent_datacenter master + pushed (cbc6ac3).
body.description:
**Approved 2026-05-03 (Akien — 'all is approved! go!').** Workflow consumer ticket: closes the lapsed practice 'all external minions for work other than design chat'. Gap diagnosis: skills don't enforce delegation, so CC defaults to writing code itself.

Add Step 0 to /sprint and /sprint-batch: read CAPABILITIES section from system prompt (already populated by T-announce-slice4-system-prompt-capability-layer manifest sync) → match ticket tags/affected-files against capability domains → if a minion or device matches, surface delegate option as one-line command before claiming.

No handler change — the manifest + CAPABILITIES injection is already shipped; this is pure skill-consumer-side work. Therefore exempt from theigors/rules/capability-protocol/two-sided-build (consumes existing capability surface, doesn't create one).

**Affected files:** /home/akien/.claude/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (insert Step 0), /home/akien/.claude/skills/sprint-batch/SKILL.md (insert Step 0)
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/capability-protocol (parent — workflow consumer of the protocol), theigors/rules/collaboration (proactive best-practice — surfacing delegation is collaborative).
**Scope boundary:** IN: Step 0 docs in both sprint skills, decision rule for when to surface delegate option (ticket tag or affected-file pattern matches a known capability domain). OUT: enforcing delegation (CC still decides). OUT: full delegate-and-wait orchestration (CC.1 + future minion fleet ticket).
**Test plan:** CC.1 integration test loading /sprint with a ticket whose tag matches a known capability — assert the Step 0 delegate prompt appears in the executor's plan-state output. Manual: claim a ticket whose tag includes 'Database' and verify Step 0 surfaces 'mcp__igor__db_query' as an option.
